title: alyssum diffusum subsp. corymbosum
intro: Alyssum diffusum subsp. corymbosum, also known as sweet Alyssum or white Alyssum, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Alyssum diffusum subsp. corymbosum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Alyssum diffusum subsp. corymbosum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
